messages.subject: Private lead should not leak
messages.snippet: Could you send your availability for a project demo?
messages.body: Could you send your availability for a client project demo next week? We have budget and want to discuss a contract.

messages.subject: Private security alert should not leak
messages.snippet: Cloudflare new sign-in detected. Please verify your account.
messages.body: Cloudflare security alert: new device login detected. Please verify this session and review OAuth token access.

messages.subject: Private invoice should not leak
messages.body: Stripe subscription renewal is due soon. The plan price changes and the invoice requires payment verification.

messages.subject: Private legal reply should not leak
messages.body: I sent the requested legal details and am waiting for attorney review.

messages.subject: Private GitHub notification should not leak
messages.body: GitHub security advisory requires review for a repository and a pull request needs approval.
